title: LaunchMe
description: LaunchMe is a Minecraft plugin that allows players to ride on top of any projectile they shoot or throw.
body: ***Hurtle yourself at your enemies! Ride your ender pearls instead of teleporting! Have a snowball fight with your body!*** This plugin allows you (or mobs) to ride any thrown or shot projectile as it flies through the air. **Features**: * Ride any projectile you shoot or throw! * Add costs for launching, like hunger, health, or items! * Support for mobs to ride their projectiles * Tweak most aspects of behavior of the plugin * [Highly configurable](https://gitlab.com/astrelion/launchme/-/blob/main/src/main/resources/config.yml) * [Editable messages](https://gitlab.com/astrelion/launchme/-/blob/main/src/main/resources/lang.yml) * [Permission support](https://gitlab.com/astrelion/launchme#permissions) * Compatible with virtually all Spigot/Paper servers * [Open-source](https://gitlab.com/astrelion/launchme) :) ![](https://gitlab.com/ASTRELION/launchme/-/raw/main/assets/launchme-usage.gif) **[Installation and Usage](https://gitlab.com/astrelion/launchme#installation)** **[Permission List](https://gitlab.com/astrelion/launchme#permissions)** **[Default Configuration](https://gitlab.com/astrelion/launchme/-/blob/main/src/main/resources/config.yml)** *If you have any issues with the plugin or would like to see a feature added please [open an issue](https://gitlab.com/astrelion/launchme/-/issues/new).* [ ![https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/LaunchMe.svg](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/LaunchMe.svg)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/launchme/9918)
